service.name: OpenAI o3-mini Reasoning API
service.description_for_ai: OpenAI reasoning model for complex problem solving. Thinks step-by-step before answering. Best for: math, science, coding, logic puzzles, multi-step analysis. Slower but more accurate than GPT-4o on hard problems.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Solve complex reasoning problems. Math proofs, algorithm design, multi-step code debugging, scientific analysis. Takes longer but produces higher quality answers for hard problems.

reasoning_effort.description: low, medium, high — controls thinking depth/cost

agent_hints.vs_gpt4o: Use o3-mini for: math proofs, complex algorithms, logic puzzles, hard coding. Use GPT-4o for: everyday tasks, writing, fast responses.
agent_hints.reasoning_effort: low=fast/cheap, medium=balanced, high=best quality/most expensive. Start with medium.
agent_hints.streaming: Reasoning models stream the final answer, not the thinking process.
